moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships are entering their final stages, culminating in the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles Finals this weekend, July 12th.

angles.name: Climax of the Championship
angles.copy: Centre Court drama intensifies! It's finals week at Wimbledon, with the biggest titles up for grabs this weekend. Who are you rooting for?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready – it's the business end of Wimbledon! Are any British hopefuls still in contention for glory?

moments.title: The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship will be held at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, from July 16-19, with practice days starting July 12.

angles.name: Golf's Biggest Stage
angles.copy: The world's best golfers descend on Royal Birkdale next week for The 154th Open Championship. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Practice Days Start
angles.copy: It's almost time for The Open! Practice days kick off this Sunday at Royal Birkdale, building anticipation for the main event.

moments.title: 2000trees Festival
moments.blurb: The 2000trees Festival, a rock and indie music festival, is currently underway in Gloucestershire, UK, from July 8-11, 2026.

angles.name: Live from Gloucestershire
angles.copy: Soundchecking is done, the gates are open! 2000trees Festival is happening now in Gloucestershire. Who's there and who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Rock and indie fans, your weekend starts now! 2000trees is bringing the noise to Gloucestershire. What's your ultimate festival track?

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival is set to take place in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland, from July 15-18, 2026, featuring traditional and contemporary Scottish music.

angles.name: Island Festival Buzz
angles.copy: Get ready for a unique festival experience! The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off next week in Stornoway. Who's heading to the Outer Hebrides?

angles.name: Scottish Music Celebration
angles.copy: From traditional to modern, the Hebridean Celtic Festival is a celebration of Scottish music and culture. Plan your trip for next week!

moments.title: Courtney Love's 62nd Birthday
moments.blurb: Courtney Love, American singer-songwriter and frontwoman of Hole, turns 62 on July 9, 2026.

angles.name: Grunge Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the one and only Courtney Love! What's your favourite Hole track or her most iconic moment?

angles.name: 90s Alternative Queen
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of 90s alternative rock icon Courtney Love today. From 'Live Through This' to her solo work, a true original.

moments.title: Jack White's 51st Birthday
moments.blurb: Jack White, American musician, singer-songwriter, and producer, known for The White Stripes, turns 51 on July 9, 2026.

angles.name: Modern Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to rock maestro Jack White! From White Stripes anthems to his incredible solo career, what's your top track?

angles.name: Guitar Hero Birthday
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of a true guitar hero, Jack White. His influence on modern rock is undeniable. Crank up a White Stripes classic today!

moments.title: Jim Kerr's 67th Birthday
moments.blurb: Jim Kerr, Scottish lead singer of Simple Minds, turns 67 on July 9, 2026.

angles.name: Scottish Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to Simple Minds frontman, the iconic Jim Kerr! What's your favourite stadium-filling anthem from the Scottish legends?

angles.name: Simple Minds Leader
angles.copy: From 'Don't You (Forget About Me)' to 'Alive and Kicking', celebrating the birthday of Simple Minds' Jim Kerr today.

moments.title: Marc Almond's 69th Birthday
moments.blurb: Marc Almond, English singer-songwriter best known as one half of Soft Cell, turns 69 on July 9, 2026.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Pioneer Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 69th Birthday to the distinctive voice of Soft Cell, Marc Almond! 'Tainted Love' is just one of his incredible contributions to music.

angles.name: Soft Cell Celebration
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of Marc Almond today. An 80s icon whose influence spans decades. What's your favourite Soft Cell track?

moments.title: Mavis Staples' 87th Birthday
moments.blurb: Mavis Staples, legendary American gospel and R&B singer, known for The Staple Singers and her solo career, turns 87 on July 10, 2026.

angles.name: Living Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the incomparable Mavis Staples! A true living legend of gospel, soul, and R&B. Her voice is pure power.

angles.name: Staple Singers Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring career of Mavis Staples on her 87th birthday. From civil rights anthems to modern collaborations, a voice for the ages.

moments.title: Suzanne Vega's 67th Birthday
moments.blurb: Suzanne Vega, American singer-songwriter known for her distinctive folk-inspired sound, turns 67 on July 11, 2026.

angles.name: Folk-Pop Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the iconic Suzanne Vega! 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner' are just two of her timeless tracks. What's your favourite?

angles.name: Unique Voice
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of the unique and captivating Suzanne Vega today. Her storytelling through song is truly special.

moments.title: Richie Sambora's 67th Birthday
moments.blurb: Richie Sambora, American rock guitarist and former lead guitarist of Bon Jovi, turns 67 on July 11, 2026.

angles.name: Rock Guitar Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to legendary Bon Jovi guitarist Richie Sambora! His riffs defined an era. What's your favourite Sambora guitar moment?

angles.name: Bon Jovi Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of Richie Sambora today. From stadium anthems to his solo work, a true rock force.

moments.title: Roger McGuinn's 84th Birthday
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, American musician and singer-songwriter best known as the frontman of The Byrds, turns 84 on July 13, 2026.

angles.name: Folk Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to the visionary Roger McGuinn of The Byrds! His jangly guitar sound changed music forever. What's your favourite Byrds track?

angles.name: The Byrds Leader
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of folk-rock legend Roger McGuinn today. A true innovator whose music continues to inspire.

moments.title: Leon Bridges' 37th Birthday
moments.blurb: Leon Bridges, American soul and R&B singer-songwriter, turns 37 on July 13, 2026.

angles.name: Modern Soul Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 37th Birthday to the incredibly smooth Leon Bridges! His retro-soul sound is a breath of fresh air. What's your favourite song?

angles.name: Soulful Celebration
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of Leon Bridges today. If you need some smooth, soulful vibes, look no further!

moments.title: Dan Reynolds' 39th Birthday
moments.blurb: Dan Reynolds, American singer, songwriter, and lead vocalist of Imagine Dragons, turns 39 on July 14, 2026.

angles.name: Imagine Dragons Frontman
angles.copy: Happy 39th Birthday to the powerful voice of Imagine Dragons, Dan Reynolds! What's the band's anthem that gets you going?

angles.name: Rock Star Birthday
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of Imagine Dragons' Dan Reynolds today. From massive hits to impactful lyrics, he's a true force.

moments.title: Olly Alexander's 36th Birthday
moments.blurb: Olly Alexander, British singer, songwriter, and actor, best known as the frontman of Years & Years, turns 36 on July 15, 2026.

angles.name: Years & Years Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 36th Birthday to the sensational Olly Alexander! From Years & Years hits to his captivating performances, what a talent.

angles.name: Pop Icon Celebration
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of Olly Alexander today! His unique style and incredible voice make him one of the UK's brightest stars.

moments.title: Joe Satriani's 70th Birthday
moments.blurb: Joe Satriani, American instrumental rock guitarist and multi-instrumentalist, turns 70 on July 15, 2026.

angles.name: Guitar God's 70th
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday to the legendary Joe Satriani! A true guitar god whose instrumental wizardry has inspired generations. What's your favourite Satch track?

angles.name: Instrumental Rock Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the big 7-0 for Joe Satriani today. His impact on instrumental rock is immense. Time to shred!

moments.title: Luke Hemmings' 30th Birthday
moments.blurb: Luke Hemmings, Australian singer, songwriter, and lead vocalist of 5 Seconds of Summer, turns 30 on July 16, 2026.

angles.name: 5SOS Frontman Turns 30
angles.copy: Happy 30th Birthday to Luke Hemmings of 5 Seconds of Summer! From 'She Looks So Perfect' to his solo work, a decade of hits. What's your fave?

angles.name: Pop-Rock Star Birthday
angles.copy: Celebrating Luke Hemmings' birthday today! A huge voice behind some massive pop-rock anthems. Get those 5SOS tunes on repeat!

moments.title: Wizkid's 36th Birthday
moments.blurb: Wizkid, Nigerian singer and songwriter, a pioneer of modern Afrobeats, turns 36 on July 16, 2026.

angles.name: Afrobeats Superstar Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 36th Birthday to the global superstar Wizkid! A true pioneer of Afrobeats, bringing his sound to the world. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Music Icon Celebration
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of Wizkid today! His influence on contemporary music is undeniable. Get ready to dance to some of his biggest hits!

moments.title: Stewart Copeland's 74th Birthday
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, American musician and composer, best known as the drummer of The Police, turns 74 on July 16, 2026.

angles.name: Police Drummer's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the rhythmic genius, Stewart Copeland of The Police! His drumming is instantly recognisable. What's your top Police track?

angles.name: Rock Legend Celebration
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of Stewart Copeland today. A founding member of The Police and a true innovator behind the kit.

moments.title: M.I.A.'s 51st Birthday
moments.blurb: M.I.A. (Mathangi Arulpragasam), British rapper, singer, and songwriter, turns 51 on July 17, 2026.

angles.name: Global Artist Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the groundbreaking M.I.A.! From 'Paper Planes' to 'Bad Girls', her unique sound is undeniable. What's your favourite?

angles.name: Innovator's Celebration
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of the incredible M.I.A. today. Her fearless creativity and global sound continue to push boundaries.

moments.title: Tom Fletcher's 41st Birthday
moments.blurb: Tom Fletcher, English singer, songwriter, guitarist, and author, best known as a member of McFly, turns 41 on July 17, 2026.

angles.name: McFly Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the brilliant Tom Fletcher of McFly! From pop-punk anthems to best-selling books, what's your favourite of his creations?

angles.name: Pop Icon Celebration
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of McFly's Tom Fletcher today! His songwriting has given us so many memorable hits.

moments.title: Dion DiMucci's 87th Birthday
moments.blurb: Dion DiMucci, American singer-songwriter known for his work with Dion and the Belmonts and his solo career, turns 87 on July 18, 2026.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the legendary Dion DiMucci! From 'Runaround Sue' to 'The Wanderer', a true icon of early rock and roll.

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of Dion today. His voice defined an era and continues to captivate. What's your favourite track?

moments.title: Martha Reeves' 85th Birthday
moments.blurb: Martha Reeves, American R&B and soul singer, known as the lead singer of Martha and the Vandellas, turns 85 on July 18, 2026.

angles.name: Motown Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday to the incredible Martha Reeves! The voice behind Motown classics like 'Dancing in the Street'. What a legend!

angles.name: Queen of Motown
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of Martha Reeves today. Her powerful vocals and stage presence made Martha and the Vandellas iconic.

moments.title: UK Summer Weather
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing varied summer weather, with warm and sunny spells in the South East, while other regions see cooler temperatures and higher chances of rain over the next 10 days.

angles.name: Summer Sunshine
angles.copy: Sunshine and warmth across parts of the UK today! Perfect weather for enjoying the summer vibes. How are you spending it?

angles.name: Mixed Forecast
angles.copy: Grab your sunnies AND your brolly! It's a mixed bag of summer weather across the UK this week. What's the forecast looking like where you are?
